name: Pickled Pears
recipeInstructions: Any good preserving pear may be used. Slice and remove the core or pickle whole; the latter method is preferred when using Sickle pears. Peel the pears. Place spices in a small cheesecloth bag and add to the vinegar and sugar, bringing to a boil. Add the pears and cook until tender. The pears will look clear when tender. Remove them with a spoon and place in sterilized jars. Boil the syrup until thickened, then pour over the pears and seal.
